curatorNote:
XCOPY's art helped define the visual language of CryptoArt through his glitch-heavy, nihilistic aesthetic and exploration of death, identity and digital decay. The 149 1/1s released on SuperRare between 2018 and 2023 (a mixture of figurative, commentary, and abstract work) hold significant artistic and historical value.

Hivemind holds five XCOPY SuperRare 1/1s, predominantly from his COVID-era work, when colors became more vibrant and lines cleaner. Figurative works Dankrupt, Some Other Asshole and THE FUD are amongst XCOPY's most notable; Dankrupt served as his X PFP throughout 2025.
